title: Refactor main.py into classes and split by file
summary: Complete the class-based refactor of main.py and split classes into separate files while preserving external behavior.
outputs: Class-based implementation extracted into separate files
Module-level entrypoints preserved as thin wrappers
acceptance_criteria: No changes to external tool schemas.
main.py responsibilities are fully moved into class files.
tasks: Implement classes per design notes and move them into separate modules.
Update imports and wiring in main.py to use the new class modules.
Keep module-level entrypoints as thin wrappers preserving current behavior.
notes: Keep logging and error handling consistent with 0.2.3.
